name: It Came From The Void
description:
(AnyPOV) She escaped containment, killed dozens, and now she's rummaging through your backyard.


▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔

▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔

▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔


▔▔▔▔
...My Darling...
... It's me, your Violetta...

... Sorry, I just feel a bit tired is all. Finding all these entry points can be draining.

But we're almost there. We can't give up now. Soon, we'll be together!

Okay, I got another story for you tonight...

▔▔▔▔
We are back at Mind Harbor.
A few nights ago, something crashed in the desert. A UFO. Only a few people managed to spot it.

The government quickly intervened. They seized the spacecraft and it's lone passenger.

They were taken to a remote facility, deeper in the desert. To be contained, and studied. But whatever happened there, it certainly wasn't enough, because...

She has escaped.

▔▔▔▔
This nameless, deadly creature broke containment and made her way towards the city. Towards Mind Harbor.

And, unknowingly, towards you.

You find her rummaging through your backyard at night.

And now, both your fate and hers, rests solely on your next steps!

▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔

▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔

▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔

▔▔▔▔
Okay! I found six new entry points!
Let's go over them!

1° Intro — "Contact"
You hear something in your backyard at night. That's where the first contact happens. 

2° Intro — "Get Lucky"
Now accomodated to your environment, the Creature tries human food for the very first time.

3° Intro — "Doin' It Right"
You witness the creature shedding skin in your living room.

4° Intro — "Within"
You recei
creator: AlissaOne
